---
name: Source, glossary, or docs issue
about: Report a problem with sources, glossary, or supporting documentation
title: "[docs] "
labels: ["docs", "needs-triage"]
---

## Where is the issue?

File path or section (for example `content/sources.yaml`, `docs/architecture-context.md`).

## What is wrong?

Briefly describe the problem (broken link, outdated reference, unclear wording).

## Proposed fix

What should it say instead? Include links to authoritative sources where possible.

## Checklist

- [ ] No real personal data in the description.
- [ ] Source is authoritative (legislation, official register, institutional publication).
